items.caption:
A slide from a presentation, featuring a diagram and text explaining the concept of a circuit breaker. the background is a gradient of blue tones, and the text is in white, with a yellow title at the top that reads "circuit breaker." below the title, there are three bullet points providing information about circuit breakers. the first point states that a generator is connected to a power line through a circuit breaker. the second point explains that the circuit breaker limits the current from the power line to the generator. the third point states that the circuit breaker allows the generator to be disconnected from the power line.

the diagram on the slide shows a simplified representation of an electrical circuit. it includes a generator, a circuit breaker, and a power line. the generator is depicted as a rectangular box with a symbol indicating it is a source of electrical power. the circuit breaker is represented by a square box with a symbol indicating it is a switch that can be opened or closed. the power line is shown as a horizontal line connecting the generator to the circuit breaker. the circuit breaker is shown in the open position, with a symbol indicating that it is not allowing the current to flow through the power line to the generator. the diagram is set against a light gray background, which contrasts with the blue background of the slide.
